finding_results.notes: Five edits across the three target zones. Zone 1 (lines 23-27): Suki now interrupts both of Noor's lists, and her analytical turns are anchored to specific cells and gaps on the spreadsheet. Zone 2 (lines 53-63): Suki's monologue broken into back-and-forth with Noor contributing mid-stream; screen-anchored with scrolling and pencil-tracing. Zone 3 (lines 93-101, 119-127): Misalignment reveal restored to rougher texture from snapshot with self-correction and profanity; contraction fixed on line 99; narrator admiration removed from line 101; dossier exchange narrator thesis removed, Noor's speech given self-correction break, Suki's thesis fragmented with physical beat. Additional: removed emotional-narration adjective at line 119.

summary: Roughened the opening analysis exchange across all three cited zones. Restored interrupted turn-shapes and screen-anchored speech where the current draft had polished live thinking into composed summaries. Suki's longest monologue broken into collaborative back-and-forth. Snapshot's rougher misalignment reveal restored with profanity and self-correction. Contraction fixed for Suki. Narrator admiration of dialogue removed. Voice split preserved: Suki interrogative and screen-anchored, Noor precise and self-correcting.
